raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/year> I was charged {$190.00} for a citi flexpay payment plan but there is no initial purchase for the amount of {$190.00} and I have not purchase order for the amount of {$190.00} and they are charging me a monthly payment plan fee of {$1.00} in addition to interest on the {$190.00} to pay in installments of XXXX for 12 months when I never made a purchase for XXXX and if I cancel the payment plan they ban me from being able to do a flexpay payment plan on a purchase for a year
